Medicare Cost MEDICARE_PMT_01 - 12 Monthly Medicare payments (For Part D, it's the cvrd_d_plan_pd_amt ; also includes Medicare Advantage premiums), (based on claim through date) Value displayed in dollars and cents
 MEDICARE_BENE_PMT_01 - 12 Monthly Medicare coinsurance and deductible payments (based on claim through date) Value displayed in dollars and cents
 MEDICARE_COIN_PMT_01-12 Monthly Medicare coinsurance payments Value displayed in dollars
